name: generation-time trace persists each event as a JSON line in pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","commit":"abc"}\n' > e1.json && printf '{"event":"generation","commit":"def"}\n' > e2.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event e1.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event e2.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl)" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
